description: msg desktop main-window capability: core IPC + the http fetch bridge (API calls to the configured msgd), the onboarding folder dialog, and the fallback Rust WebSocket. The http:default allow-list carries explicit port (`:*`) and path (`/**`) wildcards because tauri-plugin-http matches scopes with URLPattern, where a port-less pattern like `http://**` matches ONLY the scheme default port (80/443) and so rejects a real API URL such as `http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/...`.
